location: Dropped by Vulgar Militia enemies wielding it. The most convenient farm is just outside Cliffbottom Catacombs in eastern Liurnia of the Lakes — hop the low rock wall from the grace and head uphill to find 5-6 Vulgar Militia, several carrying the saw.
tactics: Rest at Cliffbottom Catacombs, clear the uphill group, then return and reset — an item-discovery boost like the Silver-Pickled Fowl Foot speeds this up.
An alternate cluster of Vulgar Militia carrying the saw spawns near Bestial Sanctum in Dragonbarrow, Caelid, useful if farming other Vulgar Militia drops there too.
The saw inflicts strong blood loss buildup, so getting hit repeatedly by one risks a bleed proc.
lore: A saw blade lashed to a long grip, brandished by the Vulgar Militia. Its serrated edge is brutally effective at opening wounds — rumor holds the militia also use it to butcher bodies for food, though no one has lived to confirm it.

builds.name: Bleed Quality Halberd
builds.why: D/D Strength-Dexterity scaling combined with innate blood loss buildup makes it a strong budget bleed-build halberd.
